overall settings.title: Spelunkers
overall settings.description: Story-driven {gold|exploration} with simple stat-based rolls for the type of action.

items.name: Refined Steel Pickaxe
items.description: For digging into rock. Primarily about brute force, but certain jobs may require some delicate hits.

locations.name: Big Room Inside Entrance
locations.description: High ceiling, with a large underground pool at the far end. Some light comes in from the entrance, noticeable especially if there are no other lights on.

locations.name: Chamber with Clinking Pillar
locations.description: Walls shine with metal in the light of their headlamps. The clinking sound is coming from the center, a pillar formation from floor to ceiling that doesn't completely look natural, but not constructed either.

locations.name: Outside Cave Entrance
locations.description: Tropical jungle, with a wide dirt path nearby. It looks like people visit the cave from time to time.

locations.name: Right Passage
locations.description: Slight breeze brings a faint metallic smell.

locations.name: Room with Crystals on Ceiling
locations.description:
Covering the crystals are Spectrum-Winged Bats with iridescent fur.

At the far end, forks into two paths. The walls on the left path are dripping water. On the right, a faint breeze carries a metallic scent.

characters.name: Adam
characters.description: Middle aged australian, heavy build. Average stats. Unpredictable—tendency to oscillate between being lazy or wildly daring.

characters.name: Karl
characters.description: Volleyball coach. Strong, best for lifting. Apparently Eastern European ethnicity, noticeable accent but with no difficulties speaking English in most contexts.

characters.name: Melaka
characters.description: Waitress, in charge of food. With African features, wearing red polo shirt and jean shorts.

characters.name: Tsayh
characters.description: Guide. Spelunking expert, brings equipment. With broadly Latin American features, wearing loose green shirt and khaki shorts.

attribs.name: Dexterity
attribs.description:
Accuracy, balance, reflexes, precision tasks.

For characters:
+1 (bulky)
+2 (average, cautious)
+3 (nimble, alert)
+4 (experienced)

Modifier for roll success. +2 is pretty good for an item, could possibly go up to +5.

attribs.name: Intelligence
attribs.description: For example, figuring out how to work mechanisms.

attribs.name: Perception
attribs.description:
Sharp-eyed, experienced: +2 to +4
Exceptionally perceptive: +5 to +6 (trained, naturally gifted)

events.name: Dig
events.description: With a shovel, pickaxe for rock, or even bare hands. Primarily strength-based, but could require dexterity for certain targeted efforts.

events.name: Hold
events.description: Holding delicate, slippery, or awkward items.

events.name: How Feeling
events.description: Use to help decide next course of action.
events.selection_strings:
Lazy
Afraid
Mischievous
Cautious
Steady
Helpful
Curious
Energetic
Impatient
Wildly Daring

events.name: Investigate
events.description: Figure out how something works or what its purpose is.

events.name: Navigate
events.description: Success in making it past a certain point, or walking on a path.

events.name: Operate
events.description: Use or manipulate something to achieve an effect.

events.name: Perceive
events.description: For example, discover details about an object by viewing it.

events.name: Seize
events.description: Catch, grab, or restrain elusive targets.
